Thornmark.description:
A world ravaged by an apocalyptic event, where society has been thrust back into a medieval era. Once-great cities lie in ruins and nature has reclaimed the land. Small communities have formed, relying on primitive technology and ancient knowledge to survive in this harsh new reality.

Amidst the ruins of sprawling metropolises, groups of survivors have established settlements within the remains of sturdy structures like grand castles. They fortified the walls and begun to rebuild their lives, guided by the wisdom of their leaders and the leadership of councils of scholars and warriors.

However, the post-apocalyptic world is not only filled with the dangers of a society struggling to rebuild but also with supernatural forces that have emerged from the shadows. Whispers of strange creatures haunting the forests and ruins have begun to circulate, and some survivors have reported encountering ghostly apparitions and unexplained phenomena.

As settlements grew, conflicts arose both within and outside its walls. Rival factions vie for control and resources, while some individuals succumb to the temptation of forbidden magic, seeking power and control over the supernatural forces that threaten them. The leaders of the settlements must navigate these challenges, seeking to maintain order and unity in the face of increasing danger.

The people of this world must navigate the treacherous landscape of political intrigue, supernatural threats, strange artifacts, etc. to shape the future of this new medieval society.
